__comments.source_path: Path to the source SQLite database. Supports ~ expansion. Default: /storage/emulated/0/Download/health/Gadgetbridge.db
__comments.upload_base_url: Base URL of the health-bridge server. The upload endpoint is constructed as <upload_base_url>/health/api/v1/upload. Default: https://oh-my-frontweb.duckdns.org. Can also be set via the HEALTH_UPLOAD_BASE_URL environment variable (takes precedence over this field).
__comments.upload_url: Optional full override for the upload endpoint. If set, takes precedence over upload_base_url and the environment variable. Must start with https://. Set to null or omit to use upload_base_url instead.
__comments.state_path: Path to the state file recording last push outcome. Supports ~ expansion. Default: ~/.local/state/health-bridge/push-state.json
__comments.poll_interval_seconds: Seconds between polls in watch mode. Must be positive. Default: 900
__comments.stability_delay_seconds: Seconds between two stat checks to confirm the source file is not being written. Must be positive. Default: 5
__comments.request_timeout_seconds: HTTP request timeout in seconds. Must be positive. Default: 120
__comments.max_retries: Maximum retry attempts for transient failures (5xx, 429, timeout). 0 means one attempt with no retry. Default: 5
__comments.max_uncompressed_bytes: Maximum source file size in bytes. Files exceeding this are rejected before upload. Default: 104857600 (100 MB)
__comments.chunk_size: Chunk size in bytes for file reading, SHA-256 computation, gzip streaming, and HTTP body streaming. Default: 1048576 (1 MB)
__comments.max_response_bytes: Maximum response body size accepted from the server in bytes. Default: 1048576 (1 MB)
__comments.token_env: Name of the environment variable holding the upload token. Default: HEALTH_UPLOAD_TOKEN
__comments.token_file: Optional path to a file containing the token. Supports ~ expansion. Lower priority than the environment variable. Set to null to disable. Default: null
